lines.speaker: Well-dressed man
lines.text: Three stories... Multiple entries... Numerous butlers...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello! What're you doing up here?

lines.speaker: Well-dressed man
lines.text: I'm here on business. I'd suggest you not worry about it. My line of work can be rather... cutthroat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not sure what you're up to, but if it's got anything to do with that villa, then I think someone might've beaten you to it...

lines.speaker: Well-dressed man
lines.text: Then it seems I now have a gap in my schedule...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well you enjoy it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What a nice man.
